# Chapter 7: Acoustics: waves in solids and fluids  (~100 pp)
- 7.1 The wave equation in fluids (12) · 7.2 The wave equation in solids: longitudinal and shear (12) · 7.3 Reflection, refraction, transmission at interfaces (12) · 7.4 Sound propagation in air, water, ground (12) · 7.5 Resonance, room acoustics, modal density (12) · 7.6 Ultrasonic and infrasonic engineering (12) · 7.7 Noise control: sources, paths, receivers (12) · 7.8 Failure section: acoustic-induced fatigue, sonic boom, rotating-machinery noise (10) · 7.9 Worked examples: speaker, sonar, NDT (6)

**Archetype**: transport, scaling, stability. **Project**: characterise the impulse response of a household room (frequency sweep, RT60, modal analysis). **Exercises**: 30.
